name: Ham-And-Cheese Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the flour, rye flour, baking powder, salt, and brown sugar in a large bowl.
2. Stir in the chopped ham and shredded Swiss cheese until evenly distributed.
3. Make a well in the center of the dry mixture.
4. In a separate bowl, lightly beat the egg and combine with milk, vegetable oil, spicy brown mustard, Worcestershire sauce, and hot sauce.
5. Pour the wet ingredients into the dry ingredients and stir just until moistened.
6. Grease muffin pans and spoon the batter into each cavity, filling them about two-thirds full.
7. Bake at 400°F for 22-25 minutes.
8. Remove from the pan immediately after baking.
